critical_issues: Cannot access ledger table: 'dynamodb.Table' object has no attribute 'describe_table'
Ledger entries can be modified - immutability compromised
Timestamp consistency check failed: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
recommendations: Address all critical issues immediately to ensure ledger security
Enable DynamoDB point-in-time recovery and implement write-once policies
Implement regular automated ledger integrity checks
Set up CloudWatch alarms for ledger anomalies
Consider implementing blockchain-style hash chaining for enhanced security
Regularly backup ledger data to immutable storage (S3 Glacier with Object Lock)
